other_observers: Marcel Such and Renee Haip; Marcel and Joel Such found and identified this bird together.
description: An overall large, chunky sparrow, with a relatively stout, conical bill. Its tail was of medium length (not any longer than the rest of the body) and its wings were fairly short. Its headBehaviors: See account in blog post: http://suchbros.blogspot.com/2010/01/red-fox-sparrow.htmlCall: Did not vocalize.Plumage: unknown
